title: Bo Rygaard: Derfor har jeg millioner stående kontant
summary_md:
# Bo Rygaard: Derfor har jeg millioner stående kontant

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-04-22  
**Market Sentiment**: Mixed

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

An episode of the Danish interview podcast 'Sådan investerar jag' featuring Bo Rygaard, chairman of Netcompany and several large companies and foundations. The conversation centres on his conservative personal investment philosophy: avoiding debt, keeping a large cash buffer for the freedom it provides, investing in real estate and private-equity-owned companies where he sits on the board, and holding Netcompany shares for the long run. The mood is reflective and personal rather than market-tactical, mixing a positive view on his own holdings with a candid story of Tesla as his worst 'investment'.

---

## Universe Stocks

### 🟡 NETC — Netcompany | **HOLD** (Strong)

**Sentiment**: Positive | **Time Horizon**: LT  
**Confidence**: 85%

Chairman and long-term shareholder who has held all shares since before the 2018 IPO despite the stock falling from ~800 to ~300; explicitly says he is in it for the long run.

#### Reasoning

Rygaard frames himself as a long-run owner who ignores short-term price swings, trusting the market to set the price. He stresses the company has met every guidance since 2018, is historically strong today, and is exposed to digitalisation/AI growth. His refusal to sell despite a large drawdown signals conviction to hold rather than trade.

#### Sell Triggers

- if Netcompany fails to meet its annual guidance
- if the consulting/digitalisation growth stalls
- if he steps down as chairman

> *"Ja, jag har behållit dem hela vägen och det tycker jag också är ett signal om att jag är där för the long run."*

---
